stories.summary: Implemented real statement status transitions and invalid-transition blocking via /api/v1/statements/{statement_id}/status.
evidence: Added real status transition endpoint: POST /api/v1/statements/{statement_id}/status
Validated uploaded -> parsing -> parsed transitions
Validated invalid transition rejection with STATEMENT_INVALID_TRANSITION

stories.summary: Implemented real file type detection with suffix and MIME consistency checks.
evidence: Validated .csv / .xls / .xlsx recognition
Validated content-type mismatch rejection with STATEMENT_FILE_TYPE_MISMATCH
Persisted detected_file_type and parser_key into statement metadata

stories.summary: Implemented upload failure handling with rollback for object storage and metadata persistence failures.
evidence: Validated empty file / oversize / unsupported suffix rejection paths
Validated object storage write failure returns 500 and leaves no metadata
Validated metadata persistence failure rolls back stored object

stories.summary: Implemented broker field mapping rules for CN-style and EN-style statement columns.
evidence: Validated CN-style column mapping rule detection
Validated EN-style column mapping rule detection
Failed statements without supported columns return STATEMENT_MAPPING_RULE_NOT_FOUND

stories.summary: Implemented TradeRecord normalization and persisted standardized trade records.
evidence: Normalized trade side into buy/sell
Normalized qty, price, fee, tax into numeric TradeRecord fields
Persisted standardized trade records into trade_records/<statement_id>.json

stories.summary: Implemented parse validation and structured parse report generation with failed-state transitions.
evidence: Generated parse report JSON with parsed_records, failed_records and issues
Transitioned statement status to parsed on clean parse
Transitioned statement status to failed with error_code on parse failure

stories.summary: Implemented rule-based profile extraction from parsed TradeRecord files.
evidence: Generated persisted profile JSON from parsed trade records
Extracted styleTags, preferredUniverse and cadence from normalized trades
Returned stable profile output through POST /api/v1/statements/{statement_id}/profile

stories.summary: Implemented style tags and risk control generation inside the persisted TradingAgentProfile.
evidence: Profile output includes styleTags and riskControls
Generated cadence, costModel and decisionPolicy fields deterministically
Validated profile query returns structured profile payload

stories.summary: Implemented real Agent creation API backed by persisted profile and agent registry records.
evidence: Created persisted agent record via POST /api/v1/agents
Returned agent_id, public_url and profile_path from the real API
Validated GET /api/v1/agents/{agent_id} and snapshot query against persisted agent data
